_comment: Per-dataset Instructor instructions for phase 0/4 encoding (and phase 3 fine-tuning when implemented). Strings copied from the ClusterLLM authors' 2_finetune/prompts.json where their dataset keys match ours; massive_domain is added parallel to their massive_intent entry. See SPEC §5.6.3.
banking77: Represent the bank purpose for retrieval:
clinc150: Represent the sentence for retrieving the purpose:
massive_intent: Represent the sentence for retrieving the purpose:
massive_domain: Represent the sentence for retrieving the domain:
goemotions: Represent an emotion sentence for retrieval:
twenty_newsgroups: Represent the news comment for retrieval:
